zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Aston於1366年出生在英國爾盧可時，她的父親Richard Aston14歲，母親Janet Hocknell17歲。她於1379年與Thomas Daniel II在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年10月8日在英國享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Aston于1366年出生在英国爾盧可时，她的父亲Richard Aston14岁，母亲Janet Hocknell17岁。她于1379年与Thomas Daniel II在英国爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年10月8日在英国享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Aston was born in 1366, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, her father, Richard Aston, was 14 and her mother, Janet Hocknell, was 17. She married Thomas Daniel II in 1379, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 October 1409, in England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Aston est née en 1366, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Aston, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Janet Hocknell, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Daniel II en 1379, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 octobre 1409, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Aston 1366 in Runcorn, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Aston 14 und ihre Mutter Janet Hocknell 17. Sie hat 1379 in Cheshire, England Thomas Daniel II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Oktober 1409 im Alter von 43 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Aston è nata il nel 1366 nel Runcorn, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Richard Aston, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Janet Hocknell, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Daniel II nel 1379, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 ottobre 1409, nel England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Astonが1366年にイギリスチェシュアイアルンコルンで生まれた時，父Richard Astonは14歳，母Janet Hocknellは17歳であった。1379年にイギリスチェシュアイアでThomas Daniel IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年10月8日にイギリスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Aston(이)가 1366년 영국 체실르 런코른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Aston(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Hocknell(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 체실르에서 Thomas Daniel II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 10월 8일 영국에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Aston nasceu em 1366, em Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Aston, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Janet Hocknell, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Daniel II em 1379, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1409, em Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Aston родилась в 1366 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Aston было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Hocknell, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Daniel II в 1379 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 октября 1409 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Aston nació en 1366, en Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Aston, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Janet Hocknell, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Thomas Daniel II en 1379, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1409, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
